text.title: Definition of Done — Multi-Role Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: QA never signs DoD; QA gaps reach production for 3 months.
antipattern.root-cause: Role omitted from DoD authoring session.
antipattern.fix: Enforce 'every active role gets a row' at validator level.

antipattern.symptom: 'Code is well-tested' as a criterion — no one agrees what that means.
Checkboxes marked, but no PR/test links; auditor cannot verify.
antipattern.root-cause: Owner clicked checkboxes without attaching evidence.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects checkmarks without evidence URLs.
